name: @atao60/email-campaign-manager-root
description: A full-stack Email Campaign Manager using Lit, tsoa, and Clean Architecture.

scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:web
scripts.coverage: npm run coverage:backend && npm run coverage:web
scripts.tree: npm run tree:backend && npm run tree:web
scripts.analyse:code:deps:all: npm run analyse:code:backend:deps:all && npm run analyse:code:client:deps:all
scripts.analyse:code:backend:deps:out: npm run analyse:code:backend:deps | npx tsx ./scripts/keep-only-mermaid.ts && npm run analyse:code:backend:deps:clean-md
scripts.analyse:code:backend:deps:svg: npm run analyse:code:backend:deps | npx tsx ./scripts/keep-only-mermaid.ts | mmdc -c ./mermaid-config.json -p ./puppeteer-config.json -i - -o backend-graph.svg && npm run analyse:code:backend:deps:clean-md
scripts.analyse:code:backend:deps:pdf: npm run analyse:code:backend:deps | npx tsx ./scripts/keep-only-mermaid.ts | mmdc -c ./mermaid-config.json -p ./puppeteer-config.json --outputFormat=pdf --pdfFit -i - -o backend-graph.pdf && npm run analyse:code:backend:deps:clean-md
scripts.analyse:code:backend:deps:all: npm run analyse:code:backend:deps:out && npm run analyse:code:backend:deps:svg && npm run analyse:code:backend:deps:pdf
scripts.analyse:code:client:deps:out: npm run analyse:code:client:deps | npx tsx ./scripts/keep-only-mermaid.ts && npm run analyse:code:client:deps:clean-md
scripts.analyse:code:client:deps:svg: npm run analyse:code:client:deps | npx tsx ./scripts/keep-only-mermaid.ts | mmdc -c ./mermaid-config.json -p ./puppeteer-config.json -i - -o client-graph.svg && npm run analyse:code:client:deps:clean-md
scripts.analyse:code:client:deps:pdf: npm run analyse:code:client:deps | npx tsx ./scripts/keep-only-mermaid.ts | mmdc -c ./mermaid-config.json -p ./puppeteer-config.json --outputFormat=pdf --pdfFit -i - -o client-graph.pdf && npm run analyse:code:client:deps:clean-md
scripts.analyse:code:client:deps:all: npm run analyse:code:client:deps:out && npm run analyse:code:client:deps:svg && npm run analyse:code:client:deps:pdf
scripts.i18n:extract: npm run i18n:migrate && npm run i18n:extract-web && npm run i18n:extract-cli && npm run i18n:restore

author: Pierre Raoul <atao60.dev@gmail.com>
